---
title: "Features"
sidebar: en
---

Établi Nuage is a native client for a self-hosted Nextcloud instance. It talks only to the server you point it at — no central service, no third party in between. The app is **in development**: Files (WebDAV) and the Link Checker already round-trip, while Contacts (CardDAV) and Calendar (CalDAV) are still being finished.

The figures below are real screenshots of the v0.1.0 build on an Android emulator. With no server configured yet, the app stays in a deliberate "not connected" state and points you to Settings — nothing is fetched until you connect.

## Not connected — the starting state

On first launch no Nextcloud server is configured, so the home tab shows a **not connected** state. It uses the suite's terminal-style breadcrumb (`~/probe/source`) and makes the next step explicit: pick a local CSV, or set the server and credentials in Settings before fetching anything from Nextcloud. Nothing leaves the device until you connect.

![Home — not connected: pick a local CSV or set Nextcloud credentials in Settings first.](../_screens/0.1.0/01-login.png){width=320}

## Settings — server & credentials

**Settings** is where you enter your Nextcloud instance URL and credentials, plus the run options for the Link Checker (check mode, usage profile, access mask, politeness/request delay). Once a reachable server and a valid app password are in place, the app talks directly to your instance. Credentials live in the platform secure store (Android EncryptedSharedPreferences) and only ever go to the configured instance.

![Settings — server and credentials, plus Link Checker run options.](../_screens/0.1.0/02-settings.png){width=320}

## Backend-dependent screens

The data screens — browsing and managing files, the live Link Checker results, and the Contacts and Calendar modules still to come — require a **reachable Nextcloud instance and valid credentials**. This capture run did not have one, so those screens are intentionally **not faked** here. They become reachable once you connect a server in Settings; a future capture against a test Nextcloud instance will extend this page with the live data views.

## Where to get it

Établi Nuage is currently an **Android-only development build**: a signed APK published with the v0.1.0 release.

| Channel | App |
|---------|-----|
| Android (APK) — **development build** | [v0.1.0 release](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-nuage/releases/tag/v0.1.0) |
| App Store (iOS) | planned — not yet available |
| Google Play (Android) | planned — not yet available |
| F-Droid | planned — not yet available |
| Source code | [`etabli-dev/etabli-nuage`](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-nuage) |
